summary: Tested auto-execute / direct-edit file persistence and preview handoff for Emanator AI Builder. All 9 test cases PASSED. The P0 fix is working correctly: proposedPlan = null is set after auto-execute, preventing PlanCard from showing for auto-executed requests.

features_tested.feature: Open 'Build a hello world page' project
Direct-edit response 'Done — I built the page in app/page.jsx' is visible
Preview tab shows 'React (Babel) + Tailwind' mode label
Preview iframe renders content (not 'No preview available yet')
No PlanCard shown for auto-executed 'Done — I built' message
features_tested.details: The auto-executed message has no PlanCard wrapper. The 1 PlanCard found is from the OLD 'Build a hello world page' request.

features_tested.feature: Preview iframe #root contains actual component content
Files API returns app/page.jsx file with content
features_tested.details: page.jsx file found in files list

features_tested.feature: No error banner or error count in preview tab

p0_fix_verification.description: After auto-execute succeeds or fails, proposedPlan = null is set in service.js to prevent PlanCard from showing
p0_fix_verification.evidence: The 'Done — I built the page in app/page.jsx' message does NOT have a PlanCard wrapper, while the OLD 'Build a hello world page' request still shows its PlanCard (expected behavior)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing 'Build a hello world page' project with ID 5d73b561-3300-4c3d-9b6b-c6476ce45a33
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-execute / direct-edit file persistence and preview handoff fully tested and working. Key findings: (1) The P0 fix in service.js lines 1206-1214 correctly sets proposedPlan = null after auto-execute, preventing PlanCard from showing. (2) Preview iframe renders React/Babel/Tailwind content correctly with dashboard components. (3) Files are persisted to DB and visible in files tab. (4) The OLD PlanCard from the first 'Build a hello world page' request is expected to still show - only NEW auto-executed requests should not show PlanCard.
